name: agent-plugins-marketplace
description: VinhLTT's personal agent plugin marketplace. A curated collection that combines plugins I develop myself with carefully selected plugins aggregated from across the community. Covers a wide range of use cases — web search, data analysis, developer tooling, and more — so you can browse, install, and mix first-party and third-party plugins from a single source to extend your agent's capabilities.

plugins.name: claude-plugins-official
plugins.description: External reference to Anthropic's official Claude Code plugin marketplace (100+ curated plugins). Use `/plugin marketplace add anthropics/claude-plugins-official` to browse/install plugins from there directly.
